Name: eCCA_TVI_Score_LongTerm_Ops
Def:
(
    (
        $(=Pick(Match(vScorecardUnitsCheck, 0, 1), 0, '[CCA TVI Unit Rating Ops]')) 
        * $(vScorecardOpsUnitWeight)
    ) +
    (
        $(=Pick(Match(vScorecardTurnTimeCheck, 0, 1), 0, '[CCA TVI Turn Times Rating Ops]'))
        * $(vScorecardOpsTurnTimeWeight)
    ) +
    (
        $(=Pick(Match(vScorecardComplexityCheck, 0, 1), 0, '[CCA TVI Loan Complexity Rating Ops]'))
        * $(vScorecardOpsComplexityWeight)    )
) / (
    $(vScorecardOpsUnitWeight) + $(vScorecardOpsTurnTimeWeight) + $(vScorecardOpsComplexityWeight)
)
DefExpanded:
(
    (
        [CCA TVI Unit Rating Ops] 
        * 7
    ) +
    (
        [CCA TVI Turn Times Rating Ops]
        * 1.5
    ) +
    (
        [CCA TVI Loan Complexity Rating Ops]
        * 1.5    )
) / (
    7 + 1.5 + 1.5
)
MeasureNames: CCA TVI Loan Complexity Rating Ops, CCA TVI Turn Times Rating Ops, CCA TVI Unit Rating Ops
VariableNames: vScorecardComplexityCheck, vScorecardOpsComplexityWeight, vScorecardOpsTurnTimeWeight, vScorecardOpsUnitWeight, vScorecardTurnTimeCheck, vScorecardUnitsCheck

Name: vLF_FeeLeakage_HardCost
Def:
=Num(
//Loans with No RESPA Applications
(Sum({<[Started Year]*={'$(vYear)'}, [RESPA App Status]*={No}>}[Fee Details - Line 805 Credit Report Fee PAC])

             )
        )
)

num ( ([CCA Scorecard Volume_ShortTerm]/3173010.4)*100  , '' )*2
// ([TVI Volume Rating_2Months]*2
+
num ( ([CCA Scorecard Margin $_ShortTerm]/89504.555405405)*100     , '' )*2
// [TVI Margin Rating_2Months]*2
+
num ( (  Pow ( [CCA Scorecard TurnTime_ShortTerm], -1 ) / 0.029661938 *100)    , '' )  /* *( num ( ([CCA Scorecard Volume_ShortTerm]/3173010.4)*100  , '' ) /100)*/ *0.5
// [TVI Turn Times Rating_2Months]*([TVI Volume Rating_2Months]/100)*0.5
+
num ( ([CCA Scorecard PullThrough_ShortTerm]/0.6998961)*100    , '' ) /* * ( num ( ([CCA Scorecard Margin $_ShortTerm]/89504.555405405)*100     , '' )  /100)*/ *1.5
// [TVI Pull Through Rating_2Months]*([TVI Margin Rating_2Months]/100)*1.5
+
num (  ([CCA Scorecard Unit_ShortTerm]/13.081081)*100   , '' ) * 2
+
Pick(vCCA_ScorecardIncludeConcession_ShortTerm, 0,num (  ([CCA Scorecard Concession_ShortTerm]/0)*100   , '' )) * 2
)
/
(2+2+0.5+1.5+2+Pick(vCCA_ScorecardIncludeConcession_ShortTerm, 0,2)) > 0"}>}Revenue)

Name: vCCA_TVI_ScorecardTurnTimeAverage_Ops_4Months
Def:
=Avg({$<[CCA TVI Scorecard Output Turn Times Ops] *= {">0"},[$(vOpsScorecardActor) Missing] *= {0},[$(vOpsScorecardActor)]*=>}
	Aggr(
    	Pow(
        If('$(vOpsScorecardActor)'='Processor',Avg({<[$(vOpsScorecardActor)_Production] *= {$(vCCA_CurrentProduction_Ops)},[Sent To Underwriting] *= {">=$(=MonthStart(AddMonths(vCurrentDateAsDate,-$(vOpsScorecardSubMonthRange))))<$(vCurrentDateAsDate)"},[$(vOpsScorecardActor) Missing] *= {0},[$(vOpsScorecardActor)]*=>}[Sent To Underwriting]-[Sent To Processing]),
		If('$(vOpsScorecardActor)'='Underwriter',Avg({<[$(vOpsScorecardActor)_Production] *= {$(vCCA_CurrentProduction_Ops)},[Sent To Closing] *= {">=$(=MonthStart(AddMonths(vCurrentDateAsDate,-$(vOpsScorecardSubMonthRange))))<$(vCurrentDateAsDate)"},[$(vOpsScorecardActor) Missing] *= {0},[$(vOpsScorecardActor)]*=>}[Sent To Closing]-[Sent To Underwriting]),
    	If('$(vOpsScorecardActor)'='Closer',Avg({<[$(vOpsScorecardActor)_Production] *= {$(vCCA_CurrentProduction_Ops)},[End Date to indicate Loan Closed/Funded] *= {">=$(=MonthStart(AddMonths(vCurrentDateAsDate,-$(vOpsScorecardSubMonthRange))))<$(vCurrentDateAsDate)"},[$(vOpsScorecardActor) Missing] *= {0},[$(vOpsScorecardActor)]*=>}[End Date to indicate Loan Closed/Funded]-[Sent To Closing]))))

        ,-1),[$(vOpsScorecardActor)]))
DefExpanded:
=Avg({$<[CCA TVI Scorecard Output Turn Times Ops] *= {">0"},[Underwriter Missing] *= {0},[Underwriter]*=>}
	Aggr(
    	Pow(
        If('Underwriter'='Processor',Avg({<[Underwriter_Production] *= {*},[Sent To Underwriting] *= {">=10/1/2025<1/22/2026"},[Underwriter Missing] *= {0},[Underwriter]*=>}[Sent To Underwriting]-[Sent To Processing]),
		If('Underwriter'='Underwriter',Avg({<[Underwriter_Production] *= {*},[Sent To Closing] *= {">=10/1/2025<1/22/2026"},[Underwriter Missing] *= {0},[Underwriter]*=>}[Sent To Closing]-[Sent To Underwriting]),
    	If('Underwriter'='Closer',Avg({<[Underwriter_Production] *= {*},[End Date to indicate Loan Closed/Funded] *= {">=10/1/2025<1/22/2026"},[Underwriter Missing] *= {0},[Underwriter]*=>}[End Date to indicate Loan Closed/Funded]-[Sent To Closing]))))

        ,-1),[Underwriter]))
FieldNames: Closer, End Date to indicate Loan Closed/Funded, Processor, Sent To Closing, Sent To Processing, Sent To Underwriting, Underwriter, Underwriter Missing, Underwriter_Production

Name: vCCA_TVI_ScorecardTurnTimesAverage_Ops_4Months
Def:
=Avg(
  {$<
    [CCA TVI Scorecard Output Turn Times Ops] *= {">0"},

                    [$(vOpsScorecardActor)]*=
                >
            } Pick(Match('$(vOpsScorecardActor)','Processor', 'Underwriter', 'Closer'), 
                [Sent To Underwriting] - [Sent To Processing], 
                [Sent To Closing] - [Sent To Underwriting],

)

Name: eCCA_TVI_Score_13Months_Ops
Def:
(
    (
        $(=Pick(Match(vScorecardUnitsCheck, 0, 1), 0, '[CCA TVI Unit Rating Ops]')) 
        * $(vScorecardOpsUnitWeight)
    ) +
    (
        $(=Pick(Match(vScorecardTurnTimeCheck, 0, 1), 0, '[CCA TVI Turn Times Rating Ops]'))
        * $(vScorecardOpsTurnTimeWeight)
    ) +
    (
        $(=Pick(Match(vScorecardComplexityCheck, 0, 1), 0, '[CCA TVI Loan Complexity Rating Ops]'))
        * $(vScorecardOpsComplexityWeight)    )
) / (
    $(vScorecardOpsUnitWeight) + $(vScorecardOpsTurnTimeWeight) + $(vScorecardOpsComplexityWeight)
)
DefExpanded:
(
    (
        [CCA TVI Unit Rating Ops] 
        * 7
    ) +
    (
        [CCA TVI Turn Times Rating Ops]
        * 1.5
    ) +
    (
        [CCA TVI Loan Complexity Rating Ops]
        * 1.5    )
) / (
    7 + 1.5 + 1.5
)
MeasureNames: CCA TVI Loan Complexity Rating Ops, CCA TVI Turn Times Rating Ops, CCA TVI Unit Rating Ops
VariableNames: vScorecardComplexityCheck, vScorecardOpsComplexityWeight, vScorecardOpsTurnTimeWeight, vScorecardOpsUnitWeight, vScorecardTurnTimeCheck, vScorecardUnitsCheck
